context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the phoenix-pubsub-patterns instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill before writing ANY PubSub or real-time broadcast code.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify with a test** — call the context function and assert the LiveView reflects the change

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Subscription not firing?** Verify the LiveView is fully connected: subscriptions inside `if connected?(socket)` only run after WebSocket upgrade, not on the initial static render.
